programme.desc: Actor Koyuki loves fermented food, visits grandmas throughout Japan who are experts in making fermented foods, and learns recipes for local dishes she wants to pass down for the future generations.

programme.title: Fun with Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world’s great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Peek-a-boo
programme.desc: Bringing out potential and capability of children aged 0 to 2 years by stimulating their feelings with pictures and sound.

programme.title: With Mother
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: 1-Minute Anime: Songs for SDGs
programme.desc: Let's learn about SDGs while singing along! A selected goal out of 17 will be introduced in each one-minute song with animation.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: Kagoshima Special (R)
programme.desc: Featuring distinguished programs ranging from entertainment shows to documentaries.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: NHK News 7 (B)
programme.desc: NHK's core news program wrapping up the day's events in an easy to understand way.

programme.title: Today's Close-up
programme.desc: The program flexibly probes into a wide range of topics from the NHK’s unique point of view.

programme.title: Tsurube's Salute to Families "Miyazawa Emma in Fushimi Ward, Kyoto Prefecture"
programme.desc: Veteran rakugo storyteller Shofukutei Tsurube travels across Japan with a personality, introducing families they meet along the way.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: NHK News 845
programme.desc: Today's latest metropolitan area news and weather information program.

programme.title: News Watch 9 (B)
programme.desc: NHK's mainstay evening news program.

programme.title: The Fountain of Ancient Wisdom "Setouchi Jakucho"
programme.desc: The challenges we face today are similar to what our forerunners went through. The program searches for clues to solve problems, utilizing the wisdoms of historical figures.

programme.title: Documentary on Popular Writers and Their Cats （New）
programme.desc: A series portraying deep bonds between cat-loving writers -- from novelists and poets to manga creators and screenwriters -- and their cats through their daily lives with newly written works.

programme.title: News Commentary
programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: International News Report 2026
programme.desc: An international news program providing in-depth report on what is happening around the world. (Dual audio when available)

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Child-Rearing Hints & Tips
programme.desc: Experts give advice to the questions and troubles from viewers about child-rearing.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Yokai
programme.desc: The yokai Ubume was said to be a ghostly woman appearing at night asking passers-by to hold her child under threat of death - we examine how this terrifying figure came to be seen sympathetically.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Kyle Card hikes along a 1000km trail following the Pacific Coast in northern Japan - he discovers local lifestyles, stunning nature, traces of the area's 2011 disaster and resilient people.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Doodles or Ukiyo-e: A series of doodles by famous artist Utagawa Kuniyoshi turn out to be carefully considered depictions of the kabuki actors of the day; what kind of statement was he trying to make?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Be earthquake-ready and learn survival tips for quakes and when you're trapped under rubble - you'll want to watch this before your next trip to Japan!

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Hokkaido / Takeya Takayuki (model maker) Fishing boats in the herring industry-which thrived here until the 1950s-featured swirling decorations that made a big impression on Takeya, a Hokkaido native.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: Choreographers create the movement and staging of a kabuki performance, contributing hugely to its appeal - our guest, expert choreographer Fujima Kanjuro, talks about the intricacies of the job.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Deadly Escape Game of Refugees
programme.desc: As the number of refugees in the world reaches unprecedented heights, smugglers have appeared claiming to transport them to safety but they instead become pawns in a game with their lives at stake.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Special
programme.desc: The Zen school of Buddhism emphasises the practice of zazen meditation as the path to enlightenment - the spirit of Zen flows through the gardens, art, cuisine and other aspects of Kyoto culture.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo mini 5min.
programme.desc: We focus on moyashi (bean sprouts) - they may not look like much, but they're popular as they're packed with vitamins and minerals, are easy to use and - most important of all - are affordable.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: We all crave attention, but one bird goes the extra mile to rise above the flock. Come to Suriname - South America's smallest country - to catch the main attraction: the Guianan cock-of-the-rock!

programme.title: Time-Lapse Journey
programme.desc: Seto Inland Sea is the largest body of water of its kind in Japan - see the sights of the Great Seto Bridge and the shallow coastal waters through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese
programme.desc: This programme presents masterpieces of classical Japanese literature - in both original forms and modern translations - with easy-to-understand imagery that conveys the world view of ancient Japan.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose
programme.desc: This programme employs 'mitateru', a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.desc: Travel the Iga Railway and Kintetsu Railway lines through Iga in Mie Prefecture, one of the Japan's leading ninja regions. Experience their traditions and training, and taste their portable rations.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Japan now has roughly 8.5 million vacant homes - we look at various initiatives that aim to address this issue, including renovating homes as investments or using them to revitalise local communities.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: Choreographers create the movement and staging of a kabuki performance, contributing hugely to its appeal - our guest, expert choreographer Fujima Kanjuro, talks about the intricacies of the job.

programme.title: The People Among the Plastic
programme.desc: The Anthropocene era is when human activity started impacting our planet - inconvenient truths pile up in some of Indonesia's poorest communities where 'plastic farmers' can barely make ends meet.

programme.title: Nun's Seasonal Calendar
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about the summer dates of shousho and taisho. The temple chefs teach us how to make two seasonal specialties: somen noodle rolls and marinated summer vegetables.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Legends
programme.desc: 84 tournaments as yokozuna, 1,187 career wins and 45 championships. These are some of the great records set by legendary Yokozuna Hakuho. We look back on his sumo career thorough archival footage.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Tune in to J-Melo for great Japanese music! This week, a live special with four diverse acts: three bands (Field of View, She's, and Negishio Tondon) plus the sana solo project sajou no hana.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Heavy machinery is indispensable in construction - we look at all kinds of machines, from small excavators to tower cranes for high-rise buildings and even cutting-edge remote operation systems.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Nyan lives in a porcelain workshop near Hikone Castle. He stays near his beloved owner during work time. Kuro lives at a temple that she patrols daily. She strikes a dramatic pose during her nap.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: We experience a warm welcome in the hard-working small communities on the islands and coast of the Yamaguchi end of the Seto Inland Sea - they are poor in amenities but rich in happiness and kindness.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "Wakey's Door" on the Japanese school backpack randoseru,"Mind and Body Exercise" to move and feel refreshed, and a Comedy Writers skit, "I Lose Things." It energises kids.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Once a bustling garment district, Sentier is now home to many Internet start-ups and hosts new restaurants, galleries and boutiques that make it a dynamic hub for trendsetting businesses in Paris.

programme.title: Ramen Japan
programme.desc: A unique ramen loaded with fresh local vegetables! Savor a premium bowl packed with rich chicken flavour.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Gifts are exchanged in the traditional betrothal rite - paper cords are twisted into intricate shapes and decorate gifts.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Today: cheering up a junior employee who is feeling down. Nyamjav Baljinnyam from Mongolia works at a car maintenance company - he takes on a role play challenge to help improve his Japanese skills.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Taoda Ayane does amazing things with milk cartons by transforming them into accessories, bags, and even clothing - the cartons are strong and water-resistant and so her creations are practical too.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: A spotlight on our diverse international community as we report on issues, speak to those involved, and get a fresh look at what it's like to live in Japan.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Reductions in Arctic sea ice caused by global warming have ironically led to record-breaking Northern Hemisphere snowfalls and frequent winter storms - what mechanism is at work?

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Hokkaido / Takeya Takayuki (model maker) Fishing boats in the herring industry-which thrived here until the 1950s-featured swirling decorations that made a big impression on Takeya, a Hokkaido native.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We visit a factory making straw hats. Find out how new ideas about design and quality transformed a producer of cheap farmers' hats into an international-award-winning brand of fashionable headwear.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Hagi, a World Heritage site of ten described as an "open-air museum," is lined with merchant and samurai houses and retains much of its 17th-century townscape. Soak in the atmosphere, in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with pianist Mine Kawakami - for which she plays exclusive pieces - helps you experience each season.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Be earthquake-ready and learn survival tips for quakes and when you're trapped under rubble - you'll want to watch this before your next trip to Japan!

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture - this episode looks at words related to kaku ('to write'). Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #28 May I take photos here? / When seeking permission to do something, change the end of a verb to 'te' (for example, 'toru' [take] becomes 'totte'), then add 'mo ii desu ka'.

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Efforts to save children have evolved in a unique way that energises people who provide services - we introduce a splendid international example of such an initiative in Matsuyama in Ehime Prefecture.

programme.title: Hello! NHK World-Japan
programme.desc: In March, NHK World-Japan launched a new online hub for Bosai-preparing for disaster. It has pages, apps and guides, in multiple languages. We also see programmes about June's theme: Mount Fuji.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This programme visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: Bookstores are closing across Japan but a shop owner in a small town in Hiroshima Prefecture is trying to beat the odds. He listens to the community for ideas on how to keep his store open.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto, and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery at the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

They travel along the Yangtze and Yellow River basins, traversing Sichuan, Zhejiang, Henan, and Shanxi provinces, climbing Mount Emei's Golden Summit, visiting Baidi City, the Yue Fei Temple in Zh

programme.title: EXTRA
programme.desc: Keep up with the news on the entertainment circle in Hong Kong and all over the world, with reports on the latest drama series, movies, concert highlights, award ceremonies and more.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: Reporting major news from Hong Kong, across the Taiwan Strait, and around the world, keeping you informed about important events as well as updates in the world of sports.

programme.title: Global View
programme.desc: Curated by seasoned journalists, Global View guides you to look at the world with a global perspective - broadening your horizons, expanding your understanding of the news, and enriching your knowledge.

programme.desc: LAM FEI (Miriam Yeung) is a beautiful, trendy yet cheerful “Wonder Women” housewife. Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 28
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 4
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: Communion - EP 12
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels. The duo’s little son Au Ka-kin (Chow Ka Lok) signs up for Greater Bay Area Youth Entrepreneurship Co

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 17
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 16
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him. His secretary CHAN HEI-MAN (Ali Lee) also has a very high regard for SIU-KIT after he joins the c

programme.title: Provocateur - EP 17
programme.desc: Following deaths of his first and second wife, cosmetic mogul CHEUK KWAN-LAM (Gallen Lo), who is left alone living with his step-daughter CHEUK MAN-LEI (Jacqueline Wong), tries to turn over a new leaf. As fate would have it, he encounters a resourceful young man called POON SIU-KIT (Fred Cheng), through whom he sees a younger version of himself, so he cannot help developing a kindly feeling for him. His secretary CHAN HEI-MAN (Ali Lee) also has a very high regard for SIU-KIT after he joins the c

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Undercover cop Lang is assigned to befriend former triad boss Fei in order to investigate a diamond heist masterminded by the ruthless gangster Big Mad. When the deal goes awry and the diamonds end up in Fei’s possession, Big Mad comes after them with a vengeance, forcing Lang and Fei to join forces as an unlikely bond begins to form between them.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: Fight Back to School III
programme.desc: When millionaire Wong is found murdered in a hotel room, Sing, who bears a striking resemblance to the victim, goes undercover as the deceased to investigate the case. With Wong's marriage already on the rocks, his wife becomes the prime suspect. However, Sing soon uncovers that Wong's close friend is suspicious as well...

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Girl with the Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: An aspiring TV actress gets into hot water when a stolen diamond is hidden in the shoes she bought for a party.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Hong Kong Hong Kong
programme.desc: After moving to Hong Kong, illegal immigrant Mang has no choice but to live in cramped quarters with male migrants who abuse her. In order to attain Hong Kong residency and a better life, she agrees to marry a lonely old carpenter. After her marriage, Mang crosses paths again with her ex-lover, and the two develop a passionate affair...

programme.title: Skyline Cruisers
programme.desc: Four professional thieves are tasked with stealing a cancer vaccine, but they are shocked to discover a pre-set bomb in the laboratory and realize it is a setup against them. Suddenly, a mysterious girl appears, holding a crucial clue that could unravel the conspiracy...

programme.title: Doubles Cause Troubles
programme.desc: Two squabbling cousins find themselves in more trouble than they can imagine after their tenant ends up dead. The gangsters and the police are both after them, and they have no idea what they have done wrong!

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey1-Pandora's box
programme.desc: Joker, a carefree bandit leader, learns he is the reincarnation of the Monkey King. As demons and immortals close in, he is drawn into a chaotic, time-bending journey with the mystical Pandora’s Box. Caught between past and present, he must choose between destiny and freedom.

programme.title: The Accidental Spy
programme.desc: Gifted salesman Siu Buck travels to Turkey to uncover his roots, only to find himself entangled in his spy father's dangerous legacy. Caught in an international conspiracy involving a lethal bioterror threat, he is thrust into a high-stakes chase. As danger closes in, Buck must push beyond his limits to stop a global crisis.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: A girl Marble witnesses a murder case and reports it to the police. After much investigation, the police can only sort out the complicated relationships between a rich merchant's mistress, a postman, a shop owner and his wife, but find no clue as to who the murderer is. Therefore, Marble decides to carry out her own investigation…

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: After provoking the son of a local tyrant, young Wong Fei Hung is sent by his father to train under Drunken Master Beggar So. When his father uncovers the tyrant's plot to sell mines to the Japanese, he becomes a target for assassination. To save his father and stop the sale, Fei Hung must forge his own "Drunken Fist" style to defeat the killers.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Comparing to the director's previous Hex. This time, however, the stakes are even higher and the gruesome goings-on even more memorable. It all starts when a noble police detective starts investigating a child killer's claims of an evil spell, then it doesn't let up until the final, bloated, maggot-ridden cadaver falls.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. Shi, a secondary PE teacher, accidentally takes a “super pill” invented by the science teacher and gains superpower, turning into Mr. B. He uses his superpower to help the school sports team win the championship and prevent crimes. When the triad is made aware of Mr. B’s superpower, they try to gain the super pill for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: Flying Swords of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: This is a remake of the original 1966 classic, Dragon Gate Inn. The country is being policed by the East and West Bureaus, whilst the Emperor’s eunuchs have attained much power and control. With all the corruption, Zhao teams up with a group of assassins to systemically kill the eunuchs in order to save the country.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Sing is a rich man studying abroad, but is so spoiled that he can never concentrate on his studies but spends his time flirting with girls. One day, Sing gets blown up by a mobster when he hooks up with his mistress, Silvia. This arrogant prankster is resurrected instead as an unbeatable cyborg with unique skills, a real job and a new true love.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: King Kong comes to Hong Kong in THE MIGTHY PEKING MAN, a uniquely Shaw Brothers spin on the ageless theme of beauty and the beast. The beast, seven stories high and hailing from the Himalayas, makes his way to the jungles of India in the wake of a violent earthquake. The beauty is Russia starlet Evelyne Kraft, a sexy blonde Tarzanette who is the Mighty Peking Man's best friend. Both are discovered by Danny Lee, a handsome young explorer who brings the odd couple back to Hong Kong, where Evelyne

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist- The Return Of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: In 1920s Shanghai, Chen Zhen goes undercover as a businessman to expose a mob boss's collaboration with the Japanese. While gaining his trust, he must also combat a wave of assassins sent by a brutal Japanese general. Fighting from the shadows in a black mask, he allies with a police captain to protect the city's patriots with his formidable fists.

programme.title: Mahjong Heroes
programme.desc: A hero helps a young student deflect a cunning and malicious gambling tycoon who is out to take over the student’s family business over a game of mahjong.

programme.title: Mr Vampire II
programme.desc: Grave-robbing archaeologists unearth a family of preserved vampires and plan to sell them on the black market. However, they accidentally break the paper spells that had kept the vampires immobilized during transport. The vampires escape, but a local herbalist Lin is soon on their trail, determined to destroy them.

programme.title: Hex Vs Witchcraft
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with bad luck owes money to a violent gangster boss and trades his wife as down payment, causing her to leave him. As he decides to kill himself, a mysterious old man offers him a proposal to marry the ghost of his dead daughter in exchange for cash and an expensive apartment.

programme.title: The Devil's Mirror
programme.desc: A power-hungry Witch who leads the Bloody Ghouls Clan, seeks two magical mirrors, Wind Mirror and Thunder Mirror, which are owned by Bai and the Wen Clan respectively. She needs both mirrors to find the location of a powerful weapon that will make her invincible and will stop at nothing to get her hands on them.

programme.title: The Scandalous Warlord
programme.desc: General Feng occupies the city of Shandong, and soldiers and civilians alike welcome him without knowing his tyrannical and lustful nature. His first official business is to inspect the brothels and take the prostitutes home to become his concubines. Feng is finally killed by his officers, but will the new general rule the city differently?

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: The Swift Knight
programme.desc: The Ming Emperor is dying with no heir to succeed the throne. His brother recalls that he has an illegitimate child with a court lady years ago and palace guards are sent to search for the heir. When the Emperor's nephew hires assassins to kill the child so he can be the successor, the Swift Knight comes to the rescue...

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: A bandit became a warlord in northern China by helping Russia fight against Japan. Due to his ignorance and silly behaviour, he is seen as a joke to everyone. The warlord is finally killed by the daughter of a troupe master whom he had killed for no reason, bringing a befitting end to a traitor.

programme.title: A Taste Of Cold Steel
programme.desc: Gan Dai Xiong is killed by Prince Wu, who seeks to seize his Purple Sword. Prince Wu's son join forces with an evil gang to steal the Purple Sword from Gan Dai Xiong's three daughters. Eventually, Gan's daughters team up with their cousin Xu to avenge their father's death.

programme.title: Les Belles
programme.desc: Acknowledged as one of the greatest Hong Kong musicals, this lavish movie starring Linda Lin, who won Best Actress for her performance, infuses its wispy plot with style and wit, and the results are pure pleasure.

programme.title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
programme.desc: Gordon Liu plays an anti-Manchu rebel who escapes to the Shaolin Temple and learns what it truly takes to become a martial arts master by challenging the 35 Shaolin Kung Fu chambers, eventually creating the 36th chamber himself.

programme.title: Forever Diamonds
programme.desc: Hua, a clever beauty, teams up with her brother to stage a jewel heist and plans to sell the loot in Singapore. To evade customs, she slips a diamond ring into the pocket of a fellow passenger, Zhang Zhi Xian, only to lose him after landing. Forced to track him down, Hua resorts to a series of clumsy schemes to get close and retrieve the ring.

programme.title: The Bloody Escape
programme.desc: Ku is a skilled Kung Fu artist brought up by the bandits and does not agree with the brutal leader of the bandit's camp. He rescues Tong, a young lady forced to become the leader's wife, causing both the authorities and bandits to come after them. Ku has to stand up against the bandits that he grew up with so as to start a new life for himself.

programme.title: The Empress Dowager
programme.desc: Award-winning drama featuring a passionate performance by Lisa Lu, enhanced by sumptuous costumes and sets, produces a powerful, fascinating story. In five thousand years of Chinese history, there was never a more fascinating woman than the dragon lady of the Ching Dynasty, also the Empress Dowager, who was the power behind the throne for the last half of the 19th century. The vast tapestry of palace intrigues is vividly brought to the screen.

programme.title: The Boxer From The Temple
programme.desc: A young monk, The Kid, was expelled from the temple due to his crazy ways. After leaving the temple, he fights a cruel bandit's son and befriends a prostitute. As he fights for justice, his "Crazy Lo Han Fist" improves with every fight.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black
programme.desc: Set during the Japanese occupation in World War II, a young orphan Tang Qi falls in a love with a young man Chang. However, their love is filled with challenges, from family pressure to the turmoil of war. When Tang Qi was raped, she is expelled from home to become a nightclub singer and embarks on a journey of no return...

programme.title: Rape of the Sword
programme.desc: The film starts out with two students fighting for their deceased master's sword called the "Green Frost Sword". Han kills the other student, takes the sword and offer it to the king. The wife of the other dead student plots to take revenge, going undercover to retrieve the sword at the first opportunity in this tale of revenge and betrayal.

programme.title: Illicit Desire
programme.desc: This instant cult classic adapts three erotic and mystical tales from the Chinese classical works, with stories spanning across time from the Tang to Ming dynasties. The stories, filled with characters such as emperors, concubines, monks and fortune-tellers, intertwine in a world of adultery, lust and greed, alongside great costumes!

programme.title: King Eagle
programme.desc: A young swordman, King Eagle, unwillingly gets involved in the internal affairs of a powerful clan and becomes their target. He is saved by the female chief of the clan, Lin, and falls in love with her. However, Lin's sister is part of all evil plots and betrays her. Even so, Lin begs King Eagle not to harm her sister.

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Huan Zhu's ghost seeks help from "Fake Ghost Catchers" Bao Tuo and Zhou Peng, after a jealous suitor's ghost seeks vengeance by murdering her and now targeting her sister. Together with actor Wu Shun Chao who possesses a supernatural talent, they unite to protect Huan Zhu's sister from both mortal and spectral threats.

programme.title: The Three Smiles
programme.desc: A talented scholar, Bo Hu, is attracted by the pretty maid, Qiu Xiang. In order to get close to her and win her love, he disguises as a servant to work in the same household. Qiu Xiang does not believe Bo Hu when he discloses his true identity to her, only falling in love with him when he reveals his talents and with his friends' help.

programme.title: The Tea House
programme.desc: Big Brother Cheng fled from the mainland to Hong Kong, where he opened a teahouse in a housing estate, hoping to find a peaceful life. However, relentless provocations from local triad gangs go unaddressed by the police, prompting Cheng and his friends at the teahouse to seek revenge.

programme.title: Love Parade
programme.desc: Fashion designer Shi asks his friend Mui to comment on his new design but is angered by her criticism. When Mui asks him to design a gown for her to attend a gala event, Shi takes revenge by making a clown costume instead. Seeing Mui's embarrassment, Shi feels guilty and apologizes to her, before they fall in love...

programme.title: The Secret Of The Dirk
programme.desc: The inhabitants of the City of Liu are forced to flee when the vicious Black Tigers gang raids their city, but are able to hide all their gold and treasures in a valley. A team of swordswomen led by Liu wants to get their hands on the treasures before the bandits, but both parties will have to contend with the wandering swordsman Chou for them...

programme.title: The Lotus Lamp
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai plays both mother and son in this lavish fable about a goddess who falls in love with a mortal scholar (Cheng Pei-pei in her debut role). Over two years in production, it was released on the first anniversary of Linda's tragic suicide.

programme.title: The Convict Killer
programme.desc: After spending fifteen years in prison on trumped-up charges for drug smuggling, the martial arts master Teng Piao embarks on a journey to take revenge on the person who sets him up - "Black Leopard". Unfortunately for Piao, no one knows the real identity of "Black Leopard", except that there is a black leopard tattoo on his chest.

programme.title: The Venus' Tear Diamond
programme.desc: Legendary rival jewel thieves Fragrant Night and Nocturnal Earl travel to Japan to steal the famous Venus' Tear Diamond. They fall quickly in love at first sight, without knowing the other person is their rival and is after the same prize. Who will get the diamond, and will it mean the end of their new found love?

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Ling Hsiao and Kuan Wang Lung are two guard chiefs working for an old convoy master. Lung is secretly in love with Fang Yen, the master's granddaughter but Yen is attracted to Ling Hsiao instead. In order to win her back, Lung sets up a trap to steal the convoy and frames Ling Hsiao for it.

programme.title: The Big Sting
programme.desc: Three buddies find a rare artifact known as the Double-Faced God but are poisoned by Lady Wu who steals the treasure from them. Before they die, they get their wives to promise to train their children to take back what is rightfully theirs. These kids grow up to exact a vengeance that turns out to be more hilarious than horrific in this comedy.

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father's deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.

programme.title: Torrent Of Desire
programme.desc: Rich playboy David is a drunk until he falls in love with a fashion model Dan Feng and marries her. David's sister Mona is in love with his best friend Han Ming, who rejected her as he secretly loves Dan Feng as well. Out of jealousy and hatred, Mona lies to David about a fake affair between Han Ming and Dan Feng...

programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 5
programme.desc: Modern girl Lian Maner (Tian Xi Wei) accidentally enters a Song dynasty village through a game and ends up in the Lian family. Along with the enigmatic Shen Nuo (Joseph Zeng), they confront eccentric relatives, farm and strive for prosperity.

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 4
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: Life of Centenarians - EP 3
programme.desc: Delve into the miraculous realm of centennial life! Each life journey could be the spark that ignites the future. Witness the boundless possibilities of life through the stories of 100 centenarians. Join the documentary series 'Life of Centenarians' and explore together the extraordinary lives of these centenarians!

programme.title: Endless Barbecue 2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Adopting a bolder perspective and more expressive storytelling, this season dives deep into streets and alleys to document the barbecue culture and everyday lives of ordinary people. Six episodes, six flavors, capturing the warmth and passion of life amidst the sizzling flames.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 7
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 21
programme.desc: The story follows two people who found Muay Thai in their ordinary lives and begin to understand the value of life. After going through countless blows, injuries, self-doubts and other ups and downs, they finally achieved their own dreams!

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 487
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.
